name: serenity
description: Static home snapshot; dev tools for layout tests

scripts.build:cases: node scripts/sync-case-images.mjs && node scripts/build-cases-all-data.mjs && node scripts/sync-analytics-into-case-all.mjs && node scripts/build-case-all-pages.mjs && node scripts/build-case-mobile-media.mjs
scripts.build:blog: node scripts/build-blog-data.mjs && node scripts/sync-blog-images.mjs && node scripts/gen-blog-articles-manifest.mjs && node scripts/gen-blog-post-pages-manifest.mjs && node scripts/build-blog-mobile-media.mjs && node scripts/sync-blog-article-content.mjs && node scripts/build-blog-article-pages.mjs
scripts.build:html: npm run build:cases && npm run build:blog && node scripts/assemble-html.cjs build && node scripts/build-blog-pages.mjs && node scripts/typography-nbsp.cjs
scripts.test:layout-smoke: npm run test:html-assemble && npm run test:clients && npm run test:home-cases && npm run test:case-all && npm run test:blog && npm run test:floating-cta && npm run test:nginx-compression && npm run test:snapshot-prefix && npm run test:docs-handbook-local && npm run test:mobile-optimization
